name: Uthshober Pore
overview: The story of an ancient Bengali family, who unite in the famous 'Durga Puja' only to revive the old secrets of the family, followed by a series of few entangled relationships and its scruples.

trailers.title: Utsober Pore (উৎসবের পরে ) | Trailer | Kaushik Sen | Rwitobroto | Aishwarya | Sreya | 27th Oct
